name: Chef Claud's Favorite Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut into 4 pieces.
2. Boil in salted water until soft.
3. Drain and let steam and dry in the same pot.
4. Add the rest of the ingredients and mash the potatoes until smooth in consistency.
